text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 356 

PRE_ICL_INPP_COINS_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Coinsurance In-Network Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1- or 3- months) of the drugs on this tier, using an in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP) during 
the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase
